notes.en: Autoclave, cool to ~55°C before adding antibiotics, then pour plates. ~25 mL per 100 mm dish.
notes.zh: 高压灭菌后冷至 ~55°C 加抗生素，倒板。每板约 25 mL (100 mm dish)。

storage.notes: Pour plates at 55°C; store inverted at 4°C with antibiotics

usage.en: LB agar for pouring solid plates for E. coli transformation and colony selection.
usage.zh: LB 琼脂，用于倒板，进行大肠杆菌转化和克隆筛选。
